name: Chocolate Dream Brownies
recipeIngredient: Frosting - 1 1/2 cups Powdered sugar, 3 tbsp Margarine, 2 tbsp Milk, 1 drop Food coloring, 3/4 tsp Peppermint extract
Glaze - 4 oz Semisweet chocolate, 2 tbsp Margarine
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease an 8 or 9 inch pan.
Melt margarine and chocolate over low heat; set aside.
In a small mixer bowl, beat sugar and eggs together for 2 minutes. Add the remaining ingredients.
Pour mixture into the pan and bake for 25 - 30 minutes, or until center is set.
For Frosting: Beat all frosting ingredients together and spread over cooled cake. Refrigerate for at least one hour.
For Glaze: Melt glazing ingredients in a saucepan and drizzle over layer. Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour.
